title: symphyotrichum oolentangiense var. laevicaule
intro: Symphyotrichum oolentangiense var. laevicaule, also known as Smooth White Aster, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum oolentangiense var. laevicaule include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
